title: MCofs Statement
syntax:
MCofs
			 sensorLogic, j1Pulses, j2Pulses, j3Pulses, j4Pulses, j1WDiff, j2WDiff
parameters:
sensorLogic	Integer expression representing the sensor logic.

j1Pulses	The pulse values between where the sensor comes on to where the Z phase is detected at the specified position of 1st joint.

j2Pulses	The pulse values between where the sensor comes on to where the Z phase is detected at the specified position of 2nd joint.

j3Pulses	The pulse values between where the sensor comes on to where the Z phase is detected at the specified position of 3rd joint.

j4Pulses	The pulse values between where the sensor comes on to where the Z phase is detected at the specified position of 4th joint.

j1WDiff	The difference between the logical value and sensor edge width at the specified position of the 1st joint.

j2WDiff	The difference between the logical value and sensor edge width at the specified position of the 2nd joint.
description:
Specifies the parameters for machine calibration.
  This parameter is necessary data for executing machine calibration with Mcal. If you specify all specification values, they are set as parameters for machine calibration.

Parameters for calibration are automatically calculated by moving the robot arm with Mcorg. It is recommended that you use Mcorg to create Mcofs values.  However, if those values are known in advance, you can input the values using this MCofs command.
notes:
IMPORTANT: MCofs Should only be Used for Maintenance Purposes:

When machine calibration is executed with Mcal, the current position is recognized based on this parameter, therefore, these data must be specified.  If wrong data is specified, the robot coordinates are incorrect, and the wrong data causes improper motion.

Absolute encoder robots:

If you attempt to execute MCOFS for absolute encoder robots, error 409 will occur, which means that the command is not supported for this type of robot.  Absolute encoder robots do not need MCOFS.
see_also:
Robot motion commands

Mcal

Mcorg

MCofs Statement Example

The following examples are done from the monitor window:

>
				MCofs

04

1364 50

4506 6304

-479 -469

>
				MCofs
 &H04, 1364, 50, 4506, 6304, -479, -469
